patches.hypothesis: Applied a robust leap year calculation algorithm, added edge case test cases, and refactored the code for improved modularity and maintainability
patches.original_hypothesis: The bug is caused by an incorrect implementation of the leap year calculation, which should follow the rules of the Gregorian calendar.

patches.hypothesis: The getDateTimeMillis method was not properly handling the leap year calculation for dates before 1582.
patches.changes: Modified the getDateTimeMillis method to use the Julian chronology for dates before 1582.
patches.diff: Modified the getDateTimeMillis method to use the Julian chronology for dates before 1582.
